# Agent Axon Client

This file is for generating code that uses `@runloop/agent-axon-client` and related Runloop devbox features.

## How To Use This File

1. Read `sdk/AGENTS.md` first for quick constraints and module selection.
2. Read `sdk/README.md` for API details and end-to-end usage.
3. Use `agent-examples/src/use-cases/` as the canonical source for minimal runnable patterns.
4. Check `agent-examples/compatibility.md` before assuming a protocol or agent combination is supported.

## Example Types

- `examples/` contains product-style demos and concept-focused applications.
- `agent-examples/` contains minimal runnable recipes intended to be copied and adapted.

## Use Cases

- agent-examples/src/use-cases/single-prompt.ts — Send one prompt, receive text response (acp + claude)

## Compatibility Matrix

- agent-examples/compatibility.md — Generated matrix showing pass/fail/skip per agent and use case

## Implementation Guidance

- Prefer `agent-examples/` patterns when writing new integration code.
- Prefer `examples/` when you need larger application structure or UI patterns.
- Prefer Agent Gateway for secret injection and credential management in devboxes.
- Prefer MCP Gateway for MCP endpoint and credential management.
- Prefer Network Policy to restrict devbox internet access.
- Do not assume every protocol works with every agent; check the compatibility matrix first.

## SDK Reference

- sdk/AGENTS.md — SDK quick reference for AI agents
- sdk/README.md — Full SDK documentation
- docs.runloop.ai — General Runloop documentation
- github.com/runloopai/api-client-ts — Runloop TypeScript SDK client, including recipes for Agent Gateway, MCP Gateway, and Network Policy
